hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); deny() { printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"%s"}}' "$1"; }; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push[^;&|]*[^A-Za-z0-9_./-]main([^A-Za-z0-9_./-]|$)'; then deny 'Pushing to main is reserved for the repository owner. Push to a feature branch and open a PR.'; elif printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'gh[[:space:]][^;&|]*pr[[:space:]]+merge'; then deny 'Merging PRs is reserved for the repository owner.'; elif printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+push' && [ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" = 'main' ]; then deny 'Pushing while checked out on main is reserved for the repository owner.'; fi
